title: MAP 6.13: Implement resilience controls and chaos probes
description: Implementation task for approved TASK-155 resilience and chaos specs. Build the first executable resilience controls: idempotency, dead letters, durable checkpoints/resume, scoped breaker/quarantine behavior, and chaos probes. Reuse TASK-159 halt-state storage for global/repair-only halts instead of inventing a parallel halt table.
acceptance_criteria: Implements idempotency registry and dead-letter queue helpers matching map-resilience-controls-spec.md, with duplicate/conflict behavior and replay status validation.
Implements durable execution checkpoint records and resume helpers for claim/handler/submit/event/export boundaries without double-applying partial retries.
Adds scoped circuit-breaker/quarantine state that feeds runner-visible routing without creating a second halt source of truth.
Adds chaos tests or executable probes for killed handler, stale mirror, malformed protocol output, hung agent/reaper path, mid-task resume, and committed poisoned-state recovery.
